phaseName: Visual, motion, and interaction complete - owner review
notes: Phase 0 repository, resume, project, public-link, conflict, and weighted-ranking audits are documented under docs/portfolio/.
Owner confirmations received July 13, 2026 are reconciled in docs/portfolio/content-inventory.md and conflicts-and-questions.md.
Phase 1 structured content, semantic responsive layouts, static project placeholders, print resume route, screenshots, and review report are complete.
The sanitized two-page PDF in output/pdf is a review draft and is not linked from the public app pending manual owner approval.
Browser verification found no final console errors or horizontal overflow from 360 to 1600 CSS pixels; sampled minimum contrast was 5.57:1.
The owner sent the exact phrase APPROVE PHASE 1 on July 14, 2026; the approved copy, section order, project selection, and responsive hierarchy are locked for Phase 2.
Rethink Automations is now tracked as NeuroPath Rethink Automation Center for sanitized beta-site showcase planning; NeuroPath relationship remains a placeholder until formally decided.
Previously unresolved facts remain intentionally omitted unless supported by new evidence.
Phase 2 neural command center, two-scene procedural WebGL runtime, six typed miniature product interfaces, Architecture Lens, supporting spatial sections, and command navigation are complete.

Phase 2 verification passed lint, no-emit TypeScript, rendered-HTML tests, production build, pack validation, six-width browser reflow, keyboard/focus checks, reduced-motion emulation, unavailable-WebGL fallback, and real WebGL context-loss simulation.

Phase 2 acceptance evidence also covers a +1.34% gzip base-index delta from checkpoint 7577ad0, all-six-preview touch activation, save-data fallback, Escape focus restoration, stable project-scene resource counts, and zeroed renderer resources after disposal.
Three.js remains an isolated dynamic client chunk; no models, textures, generated artwork, private project data, PHI, backend, authentication, or deployment change was added.
Phase 2 owner-review evidence and screenshots are documented in docs/portfolio/phase-2-report.md. Phase 3 remains unstarted.
